title: Mexican Mushroom Stir-Fry
description: A quick and flavorful Mexican-inspired stir-fry featuring sautéed mushrooms and a hint of buttery goodness.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of buttery in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced mushrooms and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown, about 5 minutes.
Add the diced Croatian (if using) and stir to combine.
Add a pinch of salt and pepper to taste.
Stir in the remaining 1 tablespoon of buttery until melted and well combined.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh cilantro or scallions (optional).
Serve with your favorite Mexican-inspired sides, such as rice, beans, or tortillas.
